title: Mirror Dimension
description: Datapack that adds a new item - a mirror that transports you to the mirror dimension
body:
The datapack adds an item that transports you to the same world that you generated, but without the subsequent changes that players will make in the future in the main world. Thanks to it, you will be able to pass through structures that were erected by your friends or escape from danger!
The mirror itself can be found in the treasure trove.
